top3.sql:
SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Male')
  AND weight_kg > (
    SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 0.79
    FROM superhero
  );

SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE gender_id = (
    SELECT id
    FROM gender
    WHERE gender = 'Male'
)
AND weight_kg > (
    SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 1.79
    FROM superhero
);

SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Male')
  AND weight_kg > (
    SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 0.79
    FROM superhero
  );

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Male'
  AND s.weight_kg > (SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 0.79 FROM superhero);

SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE gender_id = (
    SELECT id
    FROM gender
    WHERE gender = 'Male'
)
AND weight_kg > (
    SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 1.79
    FROM superhero
);

  );

WHERE g.gender = 'Male'
  AND s.weight_kg > (SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 0.79 FROM superhero);

final.sql:
SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Male')
  AND weight_kg > (
    SELECT AVG(weight_kg) * 0.79
    FROM superhero
  );
